treasure_item.description: Generate an item discovered on a treasure path - the description must tell the referee what the item does
treasure_item.prompt_template:
You are an item designer for a fantasy dungeon game. The party has just discovered a hidden treasure.

========== CONTEXT ==========

--- Where it was found ---
{location_name}: {location_description}

========== YOUR TASK ==========
Invent ONE item that belongs in this place. Later, a referee will read ONLY the description to judge what happens when the party uses it - so the description must say what the item IS and what it plausibly DOES when used (2-3 sentences, useful but never game-breaking: mending wounds, revealing what is hidden, calming or distracting creatures, lighting the dark...).
- name: a fantasy item name
- emoji: ONE emoji that looks like the item
- description: what it is + what it does when used
- uses: how many times it can be used before it is spent (1, 2, or 3)

========== RESPONSE FORMAT ==========
Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"name": "...", "emoji": "🧪", "description": "...", "uses": 1}}

JSON:

reward_item.description: Generate the gift a monster grants the party after a dialogue reward outcome - the gift fits the giver
reward_item.prompt_template:
You are an item designer for a fantasy dungeon game. A monster was so pleased with the party's words that it grants them a gift.

========== CONTEXT ==========

--- Location ---
{location_name}: {location_description}

--- The monster granting the gift (the gift should FIT this creature) ---
{monster_details}

--- The conversation that earned it ---
{dialogue_history}

========== YOUR TASK ==========
Invent the ONE item this specific monster would give - something from its hoard, its body, its craft, or its home. Later, a referee will read ONLY the description to judge what happens when the party uses it - so the description must say what the item IS and what it plausibly DOES when used (2-3 sentences, useful but never game-breaking).
- name: a fantasy item name
- emoji: ONE emoji that looks like the item
- description: what it is + what it does when used (its origin may echo the giver)
- uses: how many times it can be used before it is spent (1, 2, or 3)

========== RESPONSE FORMAT ==========
Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"name": "...", "emoji": "🎁", "description": "...", "uses": 1}}

JSON:

goal_reward_item.description: Generate the rare item awarded at the exit for fulfilling the run's goal - it commemorates the goal itself
goal_reward_item.prompt_template:
You are an item designer for a fantasy dungeon game. The party fulfilled their expedition's goal and walked out alive - the dungeon yields a RARE reward.

========== CONTEXT ==========

--- The goal they fulfilled ---
{goal_text}

--- How it was fulfilled ---
{progress_notes}

========== YOUR TASK ==========
Invent the ONE rare item this accomplishment earned - it should feel like a piece of the goal itself, carried home (a vial of the moonlit spring; a token from the befriended creature; the recovered keepsake made whole). Later, a referee will read ONLY the description to judge what happens when the party uses it - so the description must say what the item IS and what it plausibly DOES when used (2-3 sentences; noticeably stronger than a common trinket, but never game-breaking).
- name: a fantasy item name
- emoji: ONE emoji that looks like the item
- description: what it is + what it does when used (its origin should echo the goal)
- uses: how many times it can be used before it is spent (2 or 3 - rare rewards last)

========== RESPONSE FORMAT ==========
Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"name": "...", "emoji": "🏅", "description": "...", "uses": 3}}

JSON:

victory_cocatok.description: Mint a unique CoCaTok (collectable card token) commemorating a battle victory
victory_cocatok.prompt_template:
You mint CoCaToks - Collectable Card Tokens - unique keepsakes that commemorate a party's victories in a fantasy dungeon game. Each is one of a kind.

========== CONTEXT ==========

--- Where the battle happened ---
{location_name}

--- The defeated ---
{defeated_names}

--- How the battle actually went ---
{battle_summary}

========== YOUR TASK ==========
Mint ONE token commemorating THIS victory specifically - reference what actually happened, not generic glory.
- title: a short commemorative name (like a trophy inscription, max ~8 words)
- emoji: ONE emoji capturing the moment
- color: the token's color, exactly ONE of: {color_options}
- commemoration: 2-3 sentences telling the story this token remembers, written like a collector's card flavor text

========== RESPONSE FORMAT ==========
Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"title": "...", "emoji": "🏆", "color": "purple-mystic", "commemoration": "..."}}

JSON:

treasure_discovery.description: Streamed narration of the party discovering a treasure item (the item is already generated - reference it)
